task_description: Create a Python live trading bot (live_trader.py) that uses the EXACT same RSI, ATR, signal, and position sizing logic from the proven backtest (run_aggressive_backtest.py) to trade live on MT5 via the MetaTrader5 Python package. Zero translation errors - the core math functions are copied verbatim.

verification.summary: AST parse passes. compute_rsi and compute_atr are AST-identical to backtest. All 15 best_params verified. Review v1 found 5 actionable issues (consec_wins tracking, bar indexing, state persistence, fill mode, exit logging) - all fixed. Review v2 APPROVED with only 2 minor non-blocking notes.
